ab: maqitan thuini a qali qa?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: mu’apawiza sa tilhaz, mathuaw mahnar sa qali.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: mathuaw mashimzaw isaran qa?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: mathuaw mashimzaw, apashinasha sa hulus.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: mathuaw mahnar isaran qa?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: ani, minfariza, mathuaw mahaziwhiw.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: maqitan thuini a qali qa?
en: A: How's the weather today?

ab: dara wa mahnar thuini a qali, mathuaw tauduu.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: maqitan sa thuini a tanlhuan a qali qa?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: qali uka sa urum, mu’apawiza sa kilhpuz.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: maqitan ya isaran a qali qa?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: mukaktuniza qmusaz, mu’apawiza sa tilhaz numa mu’apawiza mani sa qariwazwaz.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: miakuza maniun a qali itantu?
en: A: What's the weather like where you are?

ab: inai iamin mathuaw mara’in a fari.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: miakuza maniun a qali itantu?
en: A: How is the weather there?

ab: mathuaw maqitan, mathuaw matata wa tilhaz.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: amutusi iaku malhupish.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: qali mathuaw mashimzaw, apashinasha sa hulus.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: amusaran iaku.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: a’untarawin sa qusaz ya ikahi, ata ihu tu in’aura kathu sa pashikan.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，不要忘記帶雨傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, don't forget to bring an umbrella.

ab: aqmusaz qa?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: tminubarumbuniza tu ikahi, amaqusaz painan ya ikahi.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下可能就會下雨。
en: B: It just thundered, and it might rain later.

ab: qusaziniza?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: qminusaz tu ikahi, pangqaiza qusaz thuini.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: qusaziniza?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: qminusaz painan tu ikahi, matubu sa saran.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: qusaziniza? minu matubuiza sa mihu a buut?
ch: A:在下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: qusazin isaran, ani iaku tu kminathu s pashikan.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: maqitan ihu qa?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: mathuaw mara’in sa fari numa naak a punuq infarin mathuaw makashpar.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: maqitan ihu qa?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: mathuaw mahaha sa tilhaz numa naak a punuq patilhazin mathuaw mingqaqarimuzmuz.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
